summary: Edge AI camera systems and carrier boards for robotics and physical AI teams.
editor_note: The useful bet is putting more physical AI on the camera instead of in a remote demo stack. Hellbender sells stereo AI cameras, 64-camera Vine systems, carrier boards, and CVaaS for teams that would rather test robots than wire processors. Unlike many defense-adjacent AI pitches, the product catalog is visible and shippable. Manufacturing discipline may matter more here than model cleverness.

funding.lead_investor: Magarac Venture Partners and Veredas Partners
